# services.localtimed

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.localtimed`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.localtimed.enable` | `boolean` | Enable `localtimed`, a simple daemon for keeping the system timezone up-to-date based on the current location. It uses geoclue2 to determine the current location. To avoid silent overriding by the service, if you have explicitly set a timezone, either remove it or ensure that it is set with a lower priority than the default value using `lib.mkDefault` or `lib.mkOverride`. This is to make the choice deliberate. An error will be presented otherwise. |
| `services.localtimed.geoclue2Package` | `package` | The Geoclue2 package to use. |
| `services.localtimed.package` | `package` | The localtime package to use. |
